certification_basis: Operator-facing chain inspection commands are implemented.
Commands call the unified replay reconstruction runtime as the authoritative reconstruction source.
Human-readable summaries and JSON output are supported.
Fail-closed reconstruction results are displayed to operators.
Source replay evidence is not mutated by CLI chain inspection.
The command module does not import or call execution request creation, dispatch, invocation, or execution runtimes.
known_limitations: The commands are now available as CLI surfaces, but conversation mode does not yet automatically suggest or invoke chain inspection views after each turn.
Older replay artifacts without canonical_chain_id are not upgraded to canonical identity by CLI inspection.
